title: 아크시티네오
description:
Rigged rates? Super accounts? Impossible. Fairness isn't a promise here—it's mathematically proven.

◈ Affordable — Just One Battle Pass, No In-App Shop No premium currency (Diamond) sales. No enhancement stone sales. The Battle Pass is the only monetization element in the game.

◈ Provably Fair — Unmanipulable Gacha System Not even the server can rig your pulls. The server publishes the result hash before the draw. The outcome is only finalized after you (the user) provide a random seed, making it mathematically impossible for the server to alter the results. Verify your entire pull history in-game with a single click.

◈ Fully Transparent — Open Data, No "Super Accounts" All gacha probabilities are open-source. Anyone can audit the total circulation of Ether, its creation/burn history, and global gacha statistics in real-time—no login required. The game's architecture guarantees instant detection if admins attempt to secretly inject currency.

◆ Synchro (Transformation) System Transform into 20 distinct characters, each unleashing unique skills. Channel souls from diverse dimensions—Wuxia, Fantasy, Cyberpunk, and Mythology—for strategic transformations that turn the tide of battle!

◆ Unified "Ether" Economy A single currency for upgrades, trading, and purchasing. A truly fair economy where your skill and time directly translate to combat power.

◆ Unrestricted Autopilot Let the Autopilot handle the grind. Keep farming and progressing 24/7, even while offline.

Don't take our word for it—verify it yourself. See you in ArkCity Neo!
description_short: A fair, transparent MMORPG. Summon 20 heroes, unleash Synchro skills, and conquer 21 dungeons and bosses. Grow with auto-battle and Autopilot, trade in the Ether marketplace, and fight in the arena, powered by a transparency system found in no other game. Cross-platform, mobile and PC.
